title: Ryan McRyhew
aliases: Hideous Men (earlier band, with Kristi Schaefer)
role_summary: Denver producer; peer; co-released on Noumenal Loom. Tribute SoundCloud track 'Dedication — For Colin Ward.' Earlier band Hideous Men remixed by alphabets on REMIX09 (2009).
body: Ryan McRyhew is a Denver-based electronic producer. He performed as Hideous Men (with Kristi Schaefer, 2009–2010), then Entrancer, then Thug Entrancer. He was a scene peer of Colin's from at least 2009 — Colin remixed Hideous Men on REMIX09, just three months after the band formed. He later appeared on the Noumenal Loom label (*Process 2016–2018*, 2019) and posted a tribute track "Dedication — For Colin Ward" on SoundCloud following Colin's death.
